notes: This is a provenance-only record for the earliest prototype_2016 ingestion stage.
It reflects only the first three 2016 prototype cases that were first ingested together.
Later ingestion logic widened and refined the study beyond that stage.
Stored per-case local prototype extents remain the actual prototype scientific and display extents for the preserved 2016 cases.
This initial capture box does not replace the focused Mindoro Phase 1 provenance box or the broader regional Phase 1 audit box.
